summary: Completed testing of Round 1 new features for Khmer Dubbing app. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend landing page and shared project page verified working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns 'Khmer Dubbing API' message
GET /api/shared/nonexistent returns 404
GET /api/shared/{token}/video returns 404 when no video
GET /api/shared/{token}/audio returns 404 when no audio
GET /api/shared/{token}/srt returns 404 when token doesn't exist
POST /api/projects creates project with share_token field (null by default)
POST /api/projects creates project with detected_language field (null by default)
GET /api/projects lists projects with share_token, detected_language, created_at, segments, actors fields
GET /api/projects/{id}/download-srt returns 400 when no segments
GET /api/projects/{id}/download-srt returns SRT file when segments exist
GET /api/projects/{id}/download-mp3 returns 400 when no audio
POST /api/projects/{id}/share generates share_token and returns it
POST /api/projects/{id}/share is idempotent (returns same token)
DELETE /api/projects/{id}/share removes share token
GET /api/shared/{token} returns public project info (title, status, segments, actors, has_video, has_audio)
GET /api/shared/{token} does not expose sensitive data (user_id, project_id, file paths)
GET /api/projects/{id}/download-srt returns 404 for non-existent project
GET /api/projects/{id}/download-mp3 returns 404 for non-existent project
POST /api/projects/{id}/share returns 404 for non-existent project
Landing page shows 'Any Language to Khmer' heading
Landing page shows 'Auto Language Detect' feature card
Landing page shows 'Custom Voice' feature card
Landing page shows 'Share & Export' feature card
/shared/:token route renders SharedProject page with title, segments, actors, Download SRT button
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user (test-user-001) and session (test_session: [REDACTED]
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round 1 features fully implemented and tested. New endpoints: /download-srt, /download-mp3, /share, /shared/{token}, /shared/{token}/video, /shared/{token}/audio, /shared/{token}/srt. Projects now have share_token and detected_language fields. SharedProject component renders at /shared/:shareToken route. Test credentials: session token 'test_session: [REDACTED]'.

features_verified.auto_detect_language: detected_language field added to projects, populated during transcription
features_verified.export_mp3: /api/projects/{id}/download-mp3 endpoint converts WAV to MP3 and returns it
features_verified.share_project: /api/projects/{id}/share creates share_token, /api/shared/{token} returns public project info
features_verified.project_history_dashboard: Projects list includes created_at, segments count, actors count fields
